name: Deshi Shahi Cow
description: Healthy deshi cow suitable for Qurbani. Well fed with natural grass and grains. Perfect choice for religious sacrifice.

name: Brahman Bull
description: Majestic Brahman bull with exceptional hump. Highly muscular and healthy. Ideal for those looking for a premium large animal.

name: Gir Special
description: Classic Gir breed known for its distinctive appearance and resilience. Very well-tempered and healthy.

name: Jamunapari King
description: Beautiful long-eared Jamunapari goat. Tall, elegant, and very healthy. Perfect for a standard Qurbani budget.

name: Beetal Giant
description: Strong and heavy Beetal goat. Dark coat, well-exercised, and fed with high-quality fodder.

name: Black Bengal Pure
description: Pure Black Bengal goat. Small but famous for its meat quality. Very active and healthy.

name: Holstein Friesian
description: High-yield meat breed. Large frame and excellent health. Fed with premium silage.

name: Sahiwal Bull Master
description: Solid Sahiwal bull with a distinctive brownish-red coat. Very docile but physically impressive.

name: Barbari Elite
description: Compact and alert Barbari goat. Known for its small, pointed ears and spotted appearance.

name: Sirohi Spotted
description: Strong Sirohi breed with a brown coat and white patches. Very resilient and healthy.

name: Gir Mahadev
description: Another magnificent Gir cow, selected for its broad forehead and long ears. Outstanding build.

name: Black Bengal Premium
description: A well-developed Black Bengal goat. Glossy black coat and very active temperament.

name: Tharparkar Deshi
description: A hardy Tharparkar cross. Excellent adaptation to local climate and great health profile.

name: Kiko Cross
description: Kiko crossbreed, known for its rapid growth and meat density. Very energetic.

name: Boer High-Breed
description: Premium Boer goat. Very heavy frame and high meat content. One of our top goat offerings.

name: Jersey Golden
description: Golden brown Jersey cow. Well maintained and fed with organic fodder from our own farm.

name: Osmanabadi Stout
description: Robust Osmanabadi goat. Good weight for its age and completely disease-free.

name: Red Chittagong Bull
description: Pure Red Chittagong Cattle (RCV). A heritage breed of Bangladesh, highly valued for its quality.
